hero.title: Websites Built to Get More Calls
hero.subtitle: Fast, clear, conversion-focused websites engineered for contractors and service businesses across Canada.

builtForContractors.title: Built for Contractors Across Canada
builtForContractors.subtitle: High-performance websites built for plumbers, HVAC, electricians, and service contractors who rely on inbound leads.
builtForContractors.body: Your website should do one job: turn local search into calls and estimate requests. Clear service pages, obvious CTAs, fast load times, and structure that Google understands.
builtForContractors.note: If you run a local service trade business, we build for you.

whyAll8Strip.title: Performance-first websites built for real contractors

items.label: Structured for Google Maps + local visibility

why.title: Why ALL8
why.subtitle: We build websites around one goal: turning visitors into real inquiries.

benefits.title: Clear Structure, Clear Results
benefits.description: Every page has one job. Clear messaging, visible calls-to-action, and no wasted space.

benefits.title: Local Visibility Built In
benefits.description: Google-ready structure, service areas, and review strategy so customers can actually find you.

benefits.title: Fast, Secure, Low-Maintenance
benefits.description: Clean builds with fewer moving parts. Less risk, better performance.

cta.subtitle: We’ll review your site and show you exactly what’s slowing it down or costing you leads.
cta.microText: Flat pricing • 3–5 day turnaround • No long contracts

process.title: How We Work
process.subtitle: A simple, focused process built around results.

steps.title: Audit
steps.description: We review your current site, speed, structure, and calls-to-action.

steps.title: Plan
steps.description: We outline exactly what needs improvement — no fluff.

steps.title: Build & Optimize
steps.description: We implement improvements focused on speed, clarity, and conversions.

steps.title: Measure
steps.description: Tracking and analytics show what’s working and where to improve.

faqs.a: Yes. We work with contractors and service businesses across Canada.

faqs.q: Can you improve my current site instead of rebuilding?
faqs.a: Yes. Start with a Performance Tune-Up and we’ll recommend the fastest path to better speed and more leads.
Yes. You own the site and content. No platform lock-in.

faqs.q: Do you handle hosting and maintenance?
faqs.a: Yes. We offer managed hosting, monitoring, backups, and ongoing updates.

faqs.q: How long does a build take?
faqs.a: Most projects take a few weeks depending on scope and how quickly content is approved.

services.title: Choose a Starting Point
services.subtitle: Start small with a tune-up or move straight to a full build.
